text: I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with unease. The dimly lit corridor in the first image evokes a feeling of entering the unknown, as if I am on the cusp of a new, mysterious experience. It is quiet, almost unsettlingly so. In the second image, finding myself before a wall of research and technology, I feel engaged and contemplative. The juxtaposition of human creativity and intelligent machines makes me ponder our future possibilities and challenges. Overall, being here heightens my awareness of the unknown and the infinite questions that lie ahead.
